audit_result.proof_trace: Missing Fulu deprecation check. After FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS, BlobRPCMinValidSlot still calculates minStart = currEpoch - minReqEpochs, allowing recent blobs to be served indefinitely. Should reject all requests or return far-future slot once deprecation deadline passes.
audit_result.attack_scenario: After current epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, peer sends BlobSidecarsByRangeRequest for recent slots. Handler serves blobs instead of responding empty, violating protocol deprecation requirement and preventing migration to data columns.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-028.text: blob_sidecars_by_range must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS.
